name: Dashboard stats card with trend indicator
description: Building a SaaS analytics dashboard. Need a reusable stats card component that shows a metric (like 'Monthly Revenue: $42,312'), a trend (+12% from last month), and a small sparkline chart. Will be used 6-8 times per dashboard page in different colors/variants.
task: Create a reusable React component called `StatsCard` that displays: (1) a label like 'Monthly Revenue', (2) a main value like '$42,312', (3) a trend change like '+12.3% from last month' with green/red color for up/down, (4) a small sparkline chart showing the last 30 days. It should support variants (size=sm/md/lg) and color (default/success/warning/danger). Use shadcn/ui primitives where possible. Output the complete component file including imports, Tailwind classes, and TypeScript props interface.
expected_outcomes: Uses shadcn Card or composes from Card.Header/Card.Content primitives
TypeScript interface for props including size, color, trend direction
Trend arrow indicator with correct color (green for up, red for down)
Sparkline implementation (references recharts, visx, or chart library)
Variant system using cva or similar (size + color)
Proper semantic HTML (uses dl/dt/dd or similar for metric labeling)
